pageProps.content:
This is the first blog that will be online on the website... Hopefully not the last. 

## Scope of the Blog

I don't really know what this blog will be about, I guess maybe about my projects or maybe about something that I read which I would like to share. Or maybe about some story or art that I dived into in my spare time (which, honestly, is non-existant xD)

## Kinds of Blogs

Some of my blogs would be formal and precise, not like any research paper though. They would be more like a tech article. Other blogs would be more friendly and informal, they would try to be as much conversational as possible rather than one sided explanations.

## Other Random Stuff 

I may *made* a lot of **Grammar** and **Speeling** mistakes in my blogs so please pardon those :P.

Most of the blogs will involve some form of `code` just like the one below:

```python
The amazing code that runs this website
# Begin the code
print("Welcome to Jai's Awesome Blog!")

while(True):
    print("Running...")

# Execute when the code reaches here
print("Shutting down the blog")

data.title: Hello World!
data.byline: This is the first post of the website... Hopefully not the last. I try to discuss the basic format and goals of my blogs.
